alpn_policy.description: The ALPN policy associated with the listener, which helps with protocol negotiation.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the listener.

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the SSL certificate associated with the listener.

default_action.description: The default action that the listener takes when handling requests.

load_balancer_arn.description: The ARN of the load balancer that the listener is associated with.

mutual_authentication.description: Settings related to mutual TLS authentication for the listener.

port.description: The port on which the listener is listening for requests.

protocol.description: The protocol used by the listener, such as HTTP or HTTPS.

ssl_policy.description: The SSL policy applied to the listener for securing connections.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the listener for identification and organization.
